mapper.sql: id, username, password, nickname, phone, email, status, last_login_time, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (username, password, nickname, phone, email, status, deleted, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{status}, #{deleted}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_user WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET password = #{password}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_user SET last_login_time = #{lastLoginTime}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
